    ) +
    (
        [CCA TVI Turn Times Rating Ops]
        * 1.5
    ) +
    (
        [CCA TVI Loan Complexity Rating Ops]
        * 1.5    )
) / (
    7 + 1.5 + 1.5
)
		
		,Underwriter
		
	)
	<80
    
    AND
    
	Aggr(
		(
    (
        [CCA TVI Unit Rating Ops] 
        * 7
    ) +
    (
        [CCA TVI Turn Times Rating Ops]
        * 1.5
    ) +
    (
        [CCA TVI Loan Complexity Rating Ops]
        * 1.5    )
) / (
    7 + 1.5 + 1.5
)
		
		,Underwriter
		
	)
	>=0    

,

Underwriter
	
)

,Chr(39)&','&Chr(39))

		If([Closing Projection Group] = 'Approved',[Projected Aging_Approved],

			DateType*={'Funding'}, 
			[Consolidated Channels]*={'Retail'}, 
			[Loan Officer Missing]*={0},

+
num ( ([CCA Scorecard Margin $]/271111.11022727)*100     , '' )*2
+
num ( (Pow([CCA Scorecard TurnTime],-1)/0.028419969*100)   , '' )  /**( num (  ([CCA Scorecard Volume]/10150087)*100   , '' ) /100)*/*0.5
+
num ( ([CCA Scorecard PullThrough]/0.64184293)*100     , '' ) /** ( num ( ([CCA Scorecard Margin $]/271111.11022727)*100     , '' )  /100)*/*1.5

)
/
(2+2+0.5+1.5+2+Pick(vCCA_ScorecardIncludeConcession, 0,2)) > 0"}>}

	)

Label: Units
Def:
Num(

Pick(Match(
    
    // This is the part that changes from [Waterfall Stage]
    ValueList(
        'Loans Started',
        'Loans Started with Credit Report Pulled',
        'Loans with No RESPA Applications',
        'Loans with RESPA Applications',
        'Working Pipeline',
        'Loans Still Active',
        'Total Loans with Final RESPA Status',
        'Originated Loans',
        'Fallout - Withdrawn',
        'Fallout - Denied'
    ),

    // The list of labels to match against remains the same
    'Loans Started',
    'Loans Started with Credit Report Pulled',
    'Loans with No RESPA Applications',
    'Loans with RESPA Applications',
    'Working Pipeline',
    'Loans Still Active',
    'Total Loans with Final RESPA Status',
    'Originated Loans',
    'Fallout - Withdrawn',
    'Fallout - Denied'
),

Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'}>}[Loan Number]),
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'},[Credit Pull Flag]*={'Yes'}>}[Loan Number]),
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'}, [RESPA App Status]*={'No'}>}[Loan Number]),
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'}, [RESPA App Status]*={'Yes'}>}[Loan Number]),
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'}, [RESPA App Status]*={'Yes'}>}[Loan Number])

+

// (Loans with Credit Pull = 'Yes' AND a PreApproval Date)
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'},[Credit Pull Flag]*={'Yes'}>} If(Len(Trim([PreApproval Req. Dt])) > 0, [Loan Number]))

-

// (Loans that are in BOTH of the groups above)
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'},[RESPA App Status]*={'Yes'}, [Credit Pull Flag]*={'Yes'}>} If(Len(Trim([PreApproval Req. Dt])) > 0, [Loan Number])),
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'}, [Active Loan Flag]*={'Yes'}>}[Loan Number]),
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'}, [Current Loan Status]-={"*Active*"}>}[Loan Number]),
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'}, [Pull Through Originated Flag]*={Yes}>}[Loan Number]),
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'}, [Current Loan Status]={"*withdraw*","*not accepted*","*incomp*"}, [Pull Through Originated Flag]*={No}>}[Loan Number]),
Count({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'}, [Current Loan Status]={"*denied*"}, [Pull Through Originated Flag]*={No}>}[Loan Number]),
)

,'#,##0')

	Revenue

)

Label: Avg Cost Per File
Def:
Avg(Aggr(

If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Processor',

    Avg({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCurrentProductionOps)},[Sent To Underwriting] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0}>}[Compensation $]),
If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Underwriter',

    Avg({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCurrentProductionOps)},[Sent To Closing] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0}>}[Compensation $]),
If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Closer',
	Avg({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCurrentProductionOps)},[End Date to indicate Loan Closed/Funded] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0}>}[Compensation $])
    
)))*1000

/

[Scorecard Output Units]

,[$(vOpsScorecardActor)]))
DefExpanded:
Avg(Aggr(

If('Underwriter'='Processor',

    Avg({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[Sent To Underwriting] *= {">=1/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0}>}[Compensation $]),
If('Underwriter'='Underwriter',

    Avg({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[Sent To Closing] *= {">=1/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0}>}[Compensation $]),
If('Underwriter'='Closer',
	Avg({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[End Date to indicate Loan Closed/Funded] *= {">=1/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0}>}[Compensation $])
    
)))*1000

/

[Scorecard Output Units]

,[Underwriter]))

Label: ='Total Monthly Output'
Def:
Avg(Aggr(

If(
If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Processor',Count({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCurrentProductionOps)},[Sent To Underwriting] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]),
		If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Underwriter',Count({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCurrentProductionOps)},[Sent To Closing] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]),
    		If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Closer',Count({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCurrentProductionOps)},[End Date to indicate Loan Closed/Funded] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]))))
=0,Null(),
If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Processor',Count({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCurrentProductionOps)},[Sent To Underwriting] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]),
		If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Underwriter',Count({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCurrentProductionOps)},[Sent To Closing] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]),
    		If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Closer',Count({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCurrentProductionOps)},[End Date to indicate Loan Closed/Funded] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]))))
)
,[$(vOpsScorecardActor)]))
DefExpanded:
Avg(Aggr(

If(
If('Underwriter'='Processor',Count({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[Sent To Underwriting] *= {">=1/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]),
		If('Underwriter'='Underwriter',Count({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[Sent To Closing] *= {">=1/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]),
    		If('Underwriter'='Closer',Count({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[End Date to indicate Loan Closed/Funded] *= {">=1/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]))))
=0,Null(),
If('Underwriter'='Processor',Count({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[Sent To Underwriting] *= {">=1/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]),
		If('Underwriter'='Underwriter',Count({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[Sent To Closing] *= {">=1/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0}>}distinct [Loan Number]),

)
,[Underwriter]))

		If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Underwriter',Avg({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCurrentProductionOps)},[Sent To Closing] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0}>}(1+[Loan Complexity Score])*100),

+
num ( ([CCA Scorecard PullThrough_ShortTerm]/0.6998961)*100    , '' ) /* * ( $(eCCA_TVI_MarginRating_ShortTerm)  /100)*/ *1.5
// [TVI Pull Through Rating_2Months]*([TVI Margin Rating_2Months]/100)*$(vScorecardPullThroughWeight)
+
num (  ([CCA Scorecard Unit_ShortTerm]/13.081081)*100   , '' ) * 2
+
Pick(vCCA_ScorecardIncludeConcession_ShortTerm, 0,num (  ([CCA Scorecard Concession_ShortTerm]/0)*100   , '' )) * 2
)
/
(2+2+0.5+1.5+2+Pick(vCCA_ScorecardIncludeConcession_ShortTerm, 0,2))
